scripts.wasm:hello: cd wasm-hello && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && wasm-pack build --target web && rm -rf ../public/wasm-hello && cp -r pkg ../public/wasm-hello
scripts.wasm:canvas: cd wasm-canvas && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && wasm-pack build --target web && rm -rf ../public/wasm-canvas && cp -r pkg ../public/wasm-canvas
scripts.wasm:next: cd wasm-next && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && wasm-pack build --target web && rm -rf ../public/wasm-next && cp -r pkg ../public/wasm-next
scripts.wasm:all: npm run wasm:hello && npm run wasm:canvas
